name: The Sim Club
about: The Sim Club is a members-only indoor golf simulator facility with locations in Chicago's Fulton Market and South Loop neighborhoods. The venue operates on a self-serve basis, offering 24/7 keyless access to its simulator bays. Members can book simulators online with a maximum of two hours per day and have the flexibility to cancel or reschedule at any time. The facility is designed to be a hassle-free environment where players can simply show up and play without staff assistance.
why_golfers_like_it: Dual high-speed camera systems with AI-powered shot analysis providing instant feedback
Professional-level ultra-slow motion swing cameras for detailed form analysis
GSPro software with 4K graphics and over 1,000 world-class courses
Self-serve, 24/7 access allowing for flexible practice on personal schedules
Spacious 10x16 foot bays with 135" laser TVs for an immersive experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not explicitly mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided or if members need to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about outside food or drink policies on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify typical duration for 18 holes, but mentions a maximum booking time of 2 hours per day.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Sim Club is specifically described as a members-only indoor golf simulator club with no mention of children or family-oriented activities.
